---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# product shadows

```{julia}
include("./08_RandomMeasAdd/src/RandomMeasAdd.jl")
using .RandomMeasAdd
using RandomMeas
```

## basic production

### dense shadows

```{julia}
N = 8
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit", N)
group_path = "./04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/random_group.npz"
sub_range = [3, 4, 5, 6];
sub_group, sub_indices = import_permuted_group(group_path, site_indices, sub_range);
sub_shadows = get_dense_shadows(sub_group);
```

### factorized shadows

```{julia}
N = 8
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit", N)
group_path = "./04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/random_group.npz"
sub_range = [3, 4, 5, 6];
sub_group, sub_indices = import_permuted_group(group_path, site_indices, sub_range);
sub_shadows = get_factorized_shadows(sub_group);
```

## error correction

```{julia}
# Prepare classical state
using RandomMeas
N = 8
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit", N);
ψ0 = MPS(siteindices, fill("1", N))
```

```{julia}
# get the calibration vector
using NPZ
classical_measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/classical_group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
calibration_vec = get_calibration_vector(ψ0, classical_measurement_group)
npzwrite(
    "./04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/calibration.npz",
    Dict(
        "calibration" => calibration_vec
    ),
)
```

```{julia}
# calibrated shadows 
calibration_data = npzread("./04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/calibration.npz")
calibration_vec = calibration_data["calibration"]
group_path = "./04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/random_group.npz"
sub_range = [3, 4, 5, 6];
sub_group, sub_indices = import_permuted_group(group_path, siteindices, sub_range);
sub_shadows = get_factorized_shadows(sub_group, G=calibration_vec[sub_range]);
```

## reduced shadows

Recommend to use `import_permuted_group` in `RandomMeas.jl` .
